original_text:
### Graphic Elements — Waves
- Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
- Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
- Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.
- **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

quotes: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue)
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.

rules.intent: Preserve a consistent, approved wave graphic device across all surfaces.
rules.rule_text: Wave graphic elements exist in exactly two colorways — Sunshine/Gold (warm: tok_lisraya_color_primary_sunshine #faa31b under tok_lisraya_color_primary_gold #ffc60a) and Sky Blue/Deep Blue (cool: tok_lisraya_color_secondary_deep_blue #003D74 under tok_lisraya_color_secondary_sky_blue #358CCB) — each available in long and short variants. Construction is always a top layer at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7) over the base wave, and this layered, translucent quality must always be preserved. Waves may be used alone or overlaid on photography/gradient backgrounds to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth, using only these approved color combinations.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Lock the approved masthead treatment for consistent brand presentation.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient with logo mark — Sunshine to light gold (tok_lisraya_masthead_gradient, #faa31b → #ffe05c) — is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions, with the logo mark placed at the lightest end of the gradient.
